theme_and_archetype.rationale: The website acts as a high-end portfolio. To signal craft and premium quality, we shift from a generic 'SaaS' dark mode to a warm, editorial, paper-like light theme. Dark mode remains but is refined to feel like an expensive cinematic experience.

color_palette.usage_rules: Brand blue (#2A7AFE) is strictly reserved for primary CTAs (e.g. 'Start a Project', 'Book a Call') and active states. It should NOT be used as background gradients or decorative blobs. Rely on stark contrast between background and foreground for hierarchy.

scales.h1: font-nohemi text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[7vw] leading-[0.9] tracking-tighter uppercase
scales.h2: font-nohemi text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl leading-[1.1] tracking-tight
scales.overline: font-inter text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-muted-foreground

typography.rules: Never center-align large text by default. Use left-alignment with generous right-side negative space to create tension. Keep line heights incredibly tight on headings (leading-none or leading-[0.9]).

spacing_and_layout.general: Scale up all padding. Instead of p-4 or p-6, use p-12 or p-24 for section paddings (py-24 md:py-32).
spacing_and_layout.grid: Use 12-column bento grids. Do not fill all columns perfectly; leave empty cells to create negative space.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use pure CSS 1px borders (border-border) to divide sections and create a 'Technical / Swiss' vibe. Eliminate soft drop shadows entirely; replace them with hard 1px borders or solid color offsets.

rules.hover: Subtle scale-down (scale: 0.98) on image hover, or image zoom effect within overflow-hidden containers.
rules.scroll: Staggered fade-up (y: 30, opacity: 0) on viewport entry for sections.
rules.buttons: Magnetic effect or simple sweeping background color transition. Primary CTAs should feel substantial.
rules.custom_cursor: Optional: On portfolio sections, hide the default cursor and use a custom 'View' or 'Explore' dot that follows the mouse.

Header.layout: Fixed, full width, border-b border-border, backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80.
Header.content: Left: Logo (switches automatically based on light/dark mode). Center: Navigation links (font-inter text-sm). Right: Theme toggle + 'Book a Call' CTA button.
Header.design_notes: Links should have an animated underline on hover. Keep padding generous (h-20).

Hero.layout: Asymmetric 12-column grid. pt-32 pb-24 md:pt-48 md:pb-32.
Hero.content: Left (col-span-12 md:col-span-7): Massive H1 heading (e.g., 'We Craft Presentations That Deliver Impact'). Below it, a subtle body text describing the agency, followed by the two primary CTAs (Book a Call, Start a Project). Right (col-span-12 md:col-span-5): An abstract 3D visual or floating aesthetic shape that signals creativity without looking like a literal SaaS dashboard.
Hero.design_notes: Include the 4 stat columns here, but place them discreetly at the bottom of the hero section in a thin, border-top flex strip rather than giant blocky cards.

TrustedBy.layout: Full width marquee strip (react-fast-marquee). py-8 border-y border-border.
TrustedBy.content: Monochrome client logos. opacity-40 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity.
TrustedBy.design_notes: Small overline text above the marquee: 'TRUSTED BY INNOVATIVE BRANDS'.

Services.layout: List-based accordion or sticky scroll layout.
Services.content: Left side sticky: 'Our Capabilities' (H2). Right side scrolling list: Each service has a massive number (01, 02) in Nohemi, the service title, and a small paragraph or bullet points.
Services.design_notes: Use border-b to separate each service item. When hovering over a service item, a subtle arrow (->) can animate in, or text color changes.

WhySkiFi.content: 3-4 value props. 1 large spanning card, 2 smaller squares. Use icons from lucide-react (stroke-width 1.5).
WhySkiFi.design_notes: Keep the background of the cards slightly offset (bg-card) with a crisp 1px border. No shadows.

Portfolio.layout: The Centerpiece. Full-bleed or large masonry grid.
Portfolio.content: Large, high-resolution imagery of previous work. Minimal text on the cards. On hover, reveal the project name and category via a smooth Framer Motion overlay.
Portfolio.design_notes: Use custom cursor here if possible. Ensure image height is max-h-[80vh] for mobile. Use the generated portfolio_mockup images to populate this.

Process.layout: Horizontal step sequence or vertical timeline.
Process.design_notes: Use typography to guide the eye. Oversized numbers and bold lines connecting them.

Pricing.design_notes: Make the Monthly Retainer visually dominant (perhaps a dark card in light mode, or a primary-bordered card). Clear bullet points with check icons.

Testimonials.content: Quote text in serif-style (or just large DM Sans italic), small avatar, name, and position.
Testimonials.design_notes: Can be a simple grid of 2-3 cards or a horizontal scroll.

Founder.content: Left: Founder portrait. Right: A bold statement/manifesto about why SkiFi was started.
Founder.design_notes: Feels like a magazine spread. Use the generated avatar image.

FAQ.design_notes: Override Shadcn default padding to be larger (py-6 per item). Text size text-lg or text-xl for the trigger.

FinalCTA.layout: Massive block, usually inverted background (Dark if in Light mode, Light if in Dark mode).
FinalCTA.content: Huge heading 'Ready to start?', primary CTA button.
FinalCTA.design_notes: py-32. Center aligned text for this specific section to create a final anchor.

Footer.layout: Grid structure for links, massive text at the bottom.
Footer.content: Links to /resources, /blog, /dashboard, legal pages. Bottom: Huge 'SKIFI DESIGNS' text spanning full width.
Footer.design_notes: Use text-[15vw] leading-none text-foreground/5 for the massive brand name.

FloatingContact.design_notes: Redesign from generic green circle to a pill shape: 'Get a FREE Pitchdeck Review' + WhatsApp icon. Minimalist, monochrome or brand-blue, crisp borders.

images.description: High-end luxury brand website design mockup
Minimalistic mobile app interface for fintech brand
Sleek dashboard UI floating in void mockup

implementation_instructions.step_1: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css to implement the new light (default) and dark (opt-in) HSL color tokens. Ensure ThemeContext defaults to 'light'.
implementation_instructions.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js to extend the font families (Nohemi, DM Sans, Inter) and ensure container paddings are set appropriately.
implementation_instructions.step_3: Refactor Header and Hero components to use the new asymmetric, typographic approach. Implement Framer Motion for entrance animations.
implementation_instructions.step_4: Implement TrustedBy marquee (using react-fast-marquee) and the new Services accordion.
implementation_instructions.step_5: Refactor Portfolio gallery. Replace static thumbnails with the generated high-end mockups or existing DB images, apply hover reveal effects.
implementation_instructions.step_6: Refactor Pricing, Process, Testimonials, and Founder sections using the editorial brutalism guidelines.
implementation_instructions.step_7: Update Footer and Floating WhatsApp CTA. Verify all existing flows (Book Call, OnboardingWizard, Auth) function perfectly.
